verses.text: “Ngun a kitawh khiatna a khuk om a, kham a kisian'sakna a mun mah om hi
Mihingte in lei sung panin sik tokhia a, suang sung panin sumsan a huantui uh hi
Mihingte in khuamial thukpen sung zongin, lei sung a thukpi dong hahkatin zong uh a, khuamial thuktawng sung pan suang a tokhia uh hi
Mihingte' ten'na panin a gamlapi mun, kuamah a pai ngeilohna sungah lei sung sumte a tokhia uh hi. Tua lai munah amau guak in na semsem uh a, lei thuk sungah khauhual tawh kiveisuk kiveito uh hi
I annek dingte leitungah hong pokhia a, ahi zongin leinuai thuk sung mei bangin a sa mahmah hi
Lei sunga om suangte sungah sapfaia suangmanpha om a, a leivuite sungah kham a om hi
Simbung in zong tua lampi thei ngeilo a, luimu zong tua lai-ah va leng ngeilo hi
Humpinelkai ahi a, ganhing dangte ahi zongin cikmah hunin tua lai-ah va pai ngeilo uh hi
“Mihingte in suang a sakpente to uh a, mualte' bul lei sung panin a tokhia uh hi
Suangte a tawhvang uh ciangin suangmanphate a mu uh hi
Amaute in tuinak kipatna dong lei sung to uh a, a kiphumcip nate hong suahkhia uh hi
Ahi zongin koi lai-ah pilna kimu ding ahi hiam? Koi lai-ah thutheihna nak om ahi hiam
“Mihingte in a kimuhna ding a lampi theilo uh a, mihingte' gamsungah zong a lampi omlo hi
A thuk mahmah tuipi liante in, ‘Ko' sungah omlo hi,’ ci uh a, tuipite in, ‘Ko kiangah omlo hi,’ a ci uh hi
Pilna pen kham tawh a kileizo hilo a, a man ding zah zong ngun tawh sehtheih hilo hi
Ofir kham tawh pilna a kileizo hilo a, suangmanpha pen tawh zong a kileizo hi tuanlo hi
Pilna a manphatna kham leh limlang tawh tehtheih hilo a, kham hoihpen a kibawl nate tawh zong leizawh hilo hi
Pilna a manphatna suangkhi leh limlang tawh genteh theih hilo a, pilna themkhat bek nangawn kep sangin manphazaw lai hi
Ethiopia gamah a piang topaz suangmanphate tawh tehtheih ding hilo a, kham citak hoihpen tawh zong kiteh thei tuanlo hi
“Tua ahih leh koi lai panin pilna hong piang ahi hiam? Thutheihna koi lai-ah om ahi hiam
Nuntakna a nei sung pan a mu thei kuamah omlo a, a leengthei vasate nangawn in mu theilo uh hi
Sihna leh siatna nangawn in a thu hemzak bek ung, ci lai uh hi
“Pasian bek in pilna lampi thei a, amah bek in a omna mun a thei hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in leimong dong mu a, vantung nuai-ah a om na khempeuh a mu thei hi
Pasian in huih a gik ding zah bawlin, tuipi a liatna ding zah a seh laitak
guah zukna ding mun thu pia-in, khuaphialep in a zuih ding lampi bawlin a vaihawm laitak nangawnin
amah in pilna mu-in a manphate entel a, amah in hoihsa ahih manin a kipsak hi
“Tua ciangin amah in mihingte tungah thu genin, ‘Topa zahtakna, pilna hi a, siatna pelhna pen thutheihna hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi.
